Mostafa Zaki is a Web and Graphics Designer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and a personal website.
Mostafa Zaki received a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology from Nagpur University in September 2015, and completed HSC and SSC from Maharashtra State Board of Secondary.

From 2017 to 2019, Mostafa Zaki worked as a Web and Graphics Designer at Virtuous Media Point. He also worked at e-sense IT Solution Pvt. Ltd. from October 2015 to September 2017, where he designed website solutions, gathered requirements, and participated in the SDLC.
From June 2015 to September 2015, Mostafa Zaki completed an internship at e-sense IT Solution Pvt. Ltd. focused on Web Designing and Development.

Between 2015 and 2017, Mostafa Zaki developed websites like www.nitka.com, Nagpur United Corporation (Admin Panel), Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos (Admin Panel), and Smartbadge (Admin Panel) using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery.

Mostafa Zaki designed e-commerce websites like www.shreekiaspack.co.in, www.3staragroproducts.com, and www.luckystationery.co.in using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and Notepad ++, and also created logos, brochures, and advertising materials.
Mostafa Zaki developed a web-based disease diagnosis expert system as a major project during his Bachelor’s degree, and also created a Shopping Management System as a mini project.
The individual developed a Library Management System using C++.
The individual received an award for a project competition at Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi College of Engineering, Nagpur in 2015.
The individual presented a paper at the National Level Paper Presentation event, TECH-WAVE 2015, held at S.R.M.C.E., Nagpur in 2015.
The individual possesses basic skills in programming languages C, JAVA, and C++, and is proficient in web technologies like HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery.
The individual has experience with databases like MySQL 5.0 and design tools such as Corel Draw, Adobe Photoshop, and Adobe Illustrator.
The individual utilizes IDEs and tools including Sublime Text, Notepad, and Notepad++, and is familiar with operating systems Windows XP and Windows 7.
The individual served as a coordinator in a project competition during their bachelor’s degree and participated in FACE-IT, coordinating a project competition as part of extracurricular activities.

JavaScript is a versatile and essential technology, a cornerstone of modern web development. It’s a language favored by creators like Mostafa Zaki, a web and graphics designer who skillfully wields it to bring digital visions to life. Zaki has demonstrably employed JavaScript – alongside HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and jQuery – in crafting a diverse portfolio of websites, from the full builds of platforms like www.nitka.com and administrative panels for Nagpur United Corporation and Tagline Videos, to the e-commerce storefronts of Shreekiaspack, 3staragroproducts, and Luckystationery. 

While possessing foundational knowledge in languages like C, JAVA, and C++, Zaki’s proficiency truly shines within the web technology sphere, with JavaScript consistently featured in his toolkit. It’s a language he’s used not just for front-end interactivity, but as a core component in building complete web solutions, demonstrating its power in both presentation and functionality. JavaScript, in Zaki’s hands, isn’t merely code; it’s a means of realizing tangible digital experiences.

CSS3 is a versatile styling sheet language, a core component in the digital toolkit of Mostafa Zaki. It’s the brush with which Zaki paints the visual face of the web, bringing structure and aesthetic appeal to projects ranging from dynamic e-commerce platforms – like shreekiaspack.co.in, 3staragroproducts.com, and luckystationery.co.in – to intricate administrative panels for Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge. 

Zaki wields CSS3 alongside HTML5, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery, demonstrating a fluency in modern web development practices. It’s a key element in the creation of complete website solutions, from initial requirement gathering through the full Software Development Life Cycle, as evidenced by work at e-sense IT Solution Pvt. Ltd. and Virtuous Media Point. While possessing foundational knowledge in languages like C, JAVA, and C++, CSS3 represents Zaki’s focused expertise in front-end design, shaping user experiences and visual identities across a diverse portfolio including nitka.com. Beyond websites, Zaki leverages CSS3’s capabilities in broader design tasks, contributing to logos, brochures, and advertising materials, showcasing its adaptability as a foundational skill.

Mostafa Zaki is a versatile web and graphics designer, a digital architect with a foundation built on a Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology from Nagpur University (2015). His journey began with an internship at e-sense IT Solution Pvt. Ltd. in 2015, honing his skills in web designing and development, before transitioning to a full role there, lasting until 2017. He then spent two years at Virtuous Media Point, further refining his craft. 

Zaki isn’t simply a coder; he’s a creator. He’s fluent in the languages of the web – HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery, and Bootstrap – and comfortable utilizing tools like Notepad ++ to bring visions to life. His portfolio showcases a diverse range of projects, from full e-commerce websites like shreekiaspack.co.in, 3staragroproducts.com, and luckystationery.co.in, to administrative panels for Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge. He also developed the website nitka.com. Beyond the web, Zaki extends his design expertise to crafting logos, brochures, advertising banners, and other marketing materials. 

Even during his academic career, Zaki demonstrated a proactive approach, developing a web-based disease diagnosis expert system and a Shopping Management System as key projects. He can be reached via mostafa.zaki@email.com, +20 101 234 5678, and maintains an online presence through his GitHub (github.com/mostafa-zaki), LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/mostafa-zaki), and personal website (mostafazaki.com). He’s a designer who understands the entire software development lifecycle, participating actively in each stage.

Bootstrap is a versatile toolkit favored by Mostafa Zaki, a web and graphics designer with a keen eye for bringing digital visions to life. It’s the foundational framework underpinning a portfolio of websites he’s crafted – from the sleek storefronts of Shreekiaspack.co.in, 3staragroproducts.com, and Luckystationery.co.in, to the more complex administrative interfaces of Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Smartbadge, and Tagline Videos. 

More than just a set of code libraries, Bootstrap is the silent partner in Zaki’s ability to rapidly prototype and deliver functional, visually appealing web solutions. He wields it alongside HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery, demonstrating a fluency in the core languages of the web. While possessing foundational knowledge in languages like C, JAVA, and C++, it’s within the realm of front-end development, and specifically with Bootstrap, that Zaki truly shines, shaping user experiences and translating client needs into tangible online realities. It’s a tool he’s demonstrably proficient with, consistently chosen for projects spanning e-commerce and administrative platforms between 2015 and 2019 at e-sense IT Solution and Virtuous Media Point.

2015 was a year of burgeoning potential for Mostafa Zaki, a period marked by practical application of developing web skills and early recognition. It wasn’t simply a passage of time, but a launchpad. He immersed himself in the building blocks of the digital world – HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery – translating that knowledge into tangible projects: websites like nitka.com, and the administrative panels for Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix.com, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge. This wasn’t theoretical study; it was hands-on creation, a portfolio taking shape. 

Beyond the code, 2015 brought public acknowledgement of his abilities. He distinguished himself in a project competition at Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi College of Engineering, Nagpur, earning an award that signaled promise. That same year, he confidently stepped onto a national stage, presenting a paper at TECH-WAVE 2015, a paper presentation event held at S.R.M.C.E., Nagpur. 

The year also hosted significant events like INNOVESTA 15, placing Zaki’s endeavors within a broader context of innovation and technological advancement. 2015, therefore, wasn’t just a year *in* which things happened, but a year that actively *shaped* a developing skillset and a growing reputation. It was a year of building, presenting, and being recognized – a foundation for future growth.

jQuery is a nimble, fast, and feature-rich JavaScript library, a cornerstone in the toolkit of Mostafa Zaki, a web and graphics designer with a keen eye for bringing digital visions to life. It’s the engine behind several of Zaki’s projects – from the full builds of websites like www.nitka.com and Mintmetrix.com, to the intricate admin panels for Nagpur United Corporation, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge. More than just code, jQuery is Zaki’s trusted assistant in crafting dynamic and responsive web experiences. While possessing foundational knowledge in languages like C, JAVA, and C++, Zaki consistently leverages jQuery’s streamlined syntax to manipulate HTML, handle events, perform animations, and interact with AJAX – effectively bridging the gap between static design and engaging user interaction. It’s a proficiency that defined his work at e-sense IT Solution Pvt. Ltd. between 2015 and 2017, and continues to be a valuable asset in his skillset. jQuery isn’t merely a tool for Zaki; it’s a fluent language in the creation of modern web solutions.

HTML5 is a versatile and foundational technology, the backbone of numerous digital storefronts and interactive web experiences brought to life by designers like Mostafa Zaki. It’s not a flashy element, but a quiet power – the structural core upon which modern websites are built. Zaki demonstrably wields HTML5 with proficiency, employing it alongside CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery to craft functional and visually appealing sites. 

From the e-commerce platforms of Shreekiaspack, 3Star Agro Products, and Lucky Stationery, to the administrative interfaces of Nagpur United Corporation, Mintmetrix, Tagline Videos, and Smartbadge, HTML5 serves as the essential framework. It’s the silent architect behind the user-facing elements of Nitka.com as well. While Zaki also possesses skills in languages like C, JAVA, and C++, HTML5 remains a central tool in his skillset, consistently utilized for web development projects throughout his work at both e-sense IT Solution and Virtuous Media Point. It’s a technology he doesn’t merely know, but actively *uses* to translate concepts into tangible, working web solutions.

Notepad++ is a reliable and versatile text and source code editor, favored by web developers like Mostafa Zaki. It’s a workhorse, quietly powering the creation of digital storefronts – from the layouts of Shreekiaspack.co.in and 3staragroproducts.com to the designs of Luckystationery.co.in – alongside accompanying logos, brochures, and advertising. While Zaki also employs more sophisticated Integrated Development Environments, Notepad++ remains a frequently chosen tool in their arsenal, appreciated for its speed and accessibility. Comfortable within the environments of Windows XP and 7, Notepad++ is a foundational element in Zaki’s workflow, a digital canvas for crafting the building blocks of the web. It’s a pragmatic choice, a testament to its enduring utility in a landscape of evolving technologies.
